title: Screen
summary: Full-screen root: a layout template + a column of children. The usual root of a push_screen tree.

fields.name: title
fields.notes: Screen title; rendered by the foundation/list/pinned layouts (suppressed when room chrome owns the title).

fields.name: layout
fields.notes: 0 = foundation (safe-area scrolling column, default), 1 = centered, 2 = list (sticky title + rows), 3 = pinned (scrolling content + fixed bottom CTA).

fields.name: children
fields.notes: Child nodes, rendered top to bottom into the layout slot.

notes: The pinned layout's fixed bottom CTA (zui.h screen.cta) has no CBOR key - lyt 3 over the wire renders without a bottom CTA.
